text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek's injury has been fully treated.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um... You're going to make me blush if you keep
staring at me like that.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm not pretending! If I just sit still, then it's no
big—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There you go staring again. Stop picking on me!
Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Honestly, it does hurt, but it's nothing to worry
about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm being serious... Okay?
choice_data_list: I'll cry if I find out you're lying, you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm being serious... Okay?
choice_data_list: I'll cry if I find out you're lying, you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Well, I wouldn't want to make you worry.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All right then. I hate to take advantage of your
kindness, but just this once...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could stay with me until I'm
better? I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles through the pain to stop me
from worrying.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, that won't do at all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer. It really does hurt a lot.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Gah, what do I do? I don't want you to have a
tough time because of me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Mrgh! B-but it hurts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After calming the flustered Super Creek, I take
my time tending to her injury.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me. Hehe, silly Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If I make you cry, I'll just have to own my mistake
and comfort you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll give you a biiiiig hug, and then... Oh, right. That means I have to get better fast.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...You're so cute, Trainer. Thanks for
everything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Super Creek the care that she needs, and
she happily pats me on the head.
